---
title: "help monitor resolution wont stay"
date: 2007-12-29
forum: Desktop Effects &amp; Customization
---

### Post by jopusbob on 2007-12-29
i am using a acer x191w and its manufacturer recommended resolution is 1400 by 900 but every time i log out or reboot it changes back to 1280 by 800. here is my xorg.conf

> # nvidia-xconfig: X configuration file generated by nvidia-xconfig

---

### Post by b0rka7a on 2007-12-29
I had a similar problem and I fixed it by deleting in xorg.conf under Section "Screen" the modes that I don't use and restarted the X server (Ctrl + Alt + Backspace).

For more safety, before you edit xorg.conf type in a terminal:
```
sudo cp /etc/X11/xorg.conf /etc/X11/xorg.conf-bak
```
and if something go wrong, during the X server restart, press Ctrl + Alt + F1 and type:
```
sudo cp /etc/X11/xorg.conf-bak /etc/X11/xorg.conf
```

Good luck and Happy New Year!

---
